name: Oasis Golf Center
about: Oasis Golf Center is a premier, year-round practice facility in Plymouth, Michigan. It features an indoor golf dome with 50 bays equipped with Toptracer range technology and a separate outdoor range, both of which offer year-round practice capabilities. The facility also houses a golf academy for personalized instruction and a family-friendly 18-hole miniature golf course. While the outdoor range and miniature golf are seasonally closed, the golf dome remains open as a key amenity, operating with extended hours on weekends and accommodating walk-ins without reservations.
why_golfers_like_it: Toptracer technology provides detailed shot data for accurate practice
50-bay indoor dome allows year-round play regardless of weather
No reservations required for flexible, walk-in access
Ability to play virtual rounds on world-famous courses

simulator_hardware.notes: Integrated into all 50 bays for shot tracking and virtual course play

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you must bring your own clubs to use at the facility. The outdoor range currently has a court order restricting use to irons only.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: The website does not mention any policy regarding outside food or drinks, so it is advisable to call ahead to confirm.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: As the facility uses Toptracer range technology, the time to play a virtual 18 holes will vary depending on the number of players and pace of play.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Oasis Golf Center features a family-friendly 18-hole miniature golf course and offers instruction for juniors and youth golfers.
